issues.sample: Infotainment system shuts down while driving and ultimately causes the power to drain from the vehicle leaving the vehicle inoperative. This is the second time this has happened. Acura has already repaired once with less than 1000 miles on the car. Now it’s happening again.

narrative.headline: What 2024 Acura Tlx owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 4 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (50% of reports).
